title: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor
rawPassageText:
READING PASSAGE 2
You should spend about 20 minutes on Questions 14-26, which are based on Reading Passage 2 below.

The History of the House of Windsor

A

The House of Windsor is often imagined as an ancient royal line, but its name is relatively recent. Before 1917, the British royal family belonged to the House of Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, a name inherited through Queen Victoria's husband, Prince Albert. That connection did not seem unusual in the nineteenth century, when European royal families frequently married across borders. During the First World War, however, German names became politically awkward in Britain. Newspapers, politicians and ordinary citizens increasingly expected the royal family to show that its loyalty was visibly British, not merely constitutional.

B

King George V responded in July 1917 by issuing a royal proclamation that changed the family name to Windsor. The new name was taken from Windsor Castle, a famous royal residence. At the same time, the king gave up German titles held by members of his family and asked relatives to use British styles and surnames. The decision was not simply a matter of branding. It was a wartime act designed to protect the crown from suspicion and to connect the monarchy with a familiar national symbol.

C

The early Windsors had to show that a modern constitutional monarchy could be useful without ruling directly. George V and Queen Mary made public duty central to royal life, visiting hospitals, factories and military units. Their appearances helped present the monarch as a steady figure above party politics. The king still had formal rights, but the survival of the institution depended increasingly on public confidence rather than personal power. In this sense, the new dynasty was expected to perform Britishness as much as inherit it.

D

The greatest early crisis came in 1936, when Edward VIII chose to give up the throne in order to marry Wallis Simpson, an American divorcee. The issue was not only romance. As king, Edward was also Supreme Governor of the Church of England, and many ministers believed the marriage would damage the monarchy's moral and constitutional position. His abdication placed his younger brother, George VI, on the throne. The episode showed that a private choice by a monarch could become a public constitutional problem.

E

Under George VI and then Elizabeth II, the House of Windsor became closely linked with mass media. During the Second World War, radio broadcasts allowed the royal family to speak directly to anxious households. In 1953, Elizabeth II's coronation was televised, bringing the ceremony into millions of homes and turning an old ritual into a shared national event. Later, documentaries and interviews gave the public a more intimate view of royal life. Media attention made the monarchy more visible, but it also made royal mistakes harder to hide.

F

The Windsors also had to adapt to the decline of the British Empire. When George V took the name Windsor, Britain still governed a vast imperial system. By the middle of Elizabeth II's reign, many former colonies had become independent states, and the language of empire was gradually replaced by the idea of the Commonwealth. The monarch's role therefore shifted from imperial ruler to symbolic head of a voluntary association. This change required careful ceremony and diplomacy, because the crown had to appear continuous while the political world around it was being transformed.

G

Family identity caused another adjustment after Elizabeth II married Prince Philip, who had taken the surname Mountbatten. Some officials feared that the royal house might appear to change again if the couple's descendants used Philip's name. In 1960, it was announced that most descendants who needed a surname would use Mountbatten-Windsor. This compromise kept the official royal house as Windsor while recognising Philip's family name. It also showed how dynastic history could depend on practical decisions about names, marriages and succession.

H

In the twenty-first century, the House of Windsor faces questions that earlier monarchs could not have imagined in the same form. Public debate now includes media privacy, colonial memory, online criticism and the cost of royal ceremony. Yet the dynasty's history suggests that adaptation has always been part of its survival. The name Windsor itself was created because old royal habits no longer suited a wartime democracy. The central challenge remains similar: to preserve tradition while convincing the public that the monarchy still belongs to the present.

Questions 14-20

Reading Passage 2 has eight paragraphs, A-H.

Choose the correct heading for each section from the list of headings below.

Write the correct number, i-x, in boxes 14-20 on your answer sheet.

List of Headings

i Why a German family name became a liability

ii A wartime decision to create a British royal name

iii Early constitutional role and public expectation

iv A dynasty shaped by broadcast media

v Marriage, succession and a new family surname

vi The effect of imperial change on the monarchy

vii Ceremonies that strengthened national visibility

viii A crisis caused by a king's private choice

ix The oldest royal house in Europe

x New questions in the twenty-first century

14 Section C
15 Section B
16 Section A
17 Section D
18 Section E
19 Section F
20 Section G

Questions 21-26

Complete the summary below.

Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.

Write your answers in boxes 21-26 on your answer sheet.

The Windsor name and its development

Before 1917, the British royal family used a name inherited through Prince 21 .................... . George V selected Windsor because it was connected with a famous 22 .................... . The new name helped protect the 23 .................... from suspicion during wartime. Later, Edward VIII's wish to marry Wallis Simpson created a constitutional 24 .................... . Under Elizabeth II, the monarchy had to adjust as many former 25 .................... became independent. A later compromise allowed some descendants to use the surname 26 .................... .
rawAnswerKey:
Question 14: Section C

Correct Answer: iii

Accepted Answers: iii

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: The early Windsors had to show that a modern constitutional monarchy could be useful without ruling directly.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ iii เพราะย่อหน้า C เน้นบทบาทช่วงต้นของ Windsors ในฐานะ constitutional monarchy ที่ต้องสร้าง public confidence มากกว่าการใช้อำนาจโดยตรง ย่อหน้านี้พูดถึง public duty, visits และการเป็น steady figure above party politics จึงตรงกับ heading เรื่อง Early constitutional role and public expectation ไม่ใช่เรื่องสื่อหรือจักรวรรดิ

Paraphrased Vocabulary: early constitutional role = modern constitutional monarchy; public expectation = public confidence / public duty; answer signal = iii

Question 15: Section B

Correct Answer: ii

Accepted Answers: ii

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: King George V responded in July 1917 by issuing a royal proclamation that changed the family name to Windsor.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ ii เพราะย่อหน้า B กล่าวถึงการตัดสินใจของ George V ในปี 1917 เพื่อเปลี่ยนชื่อราชวงศ์เป็น Windsor และ passage ระบุว่านี่เป็น wartime act เพื่อปกป้อง crown จาก suspicion ดังนั้น heading “A wartime decision to create a British royal name” สรุปย่อหน้านี้ได้ครบที่สุด ทั้งช่วงเวลา สาเหตุ และผลของการเปลี่ยนชื่อ

Paraphrased Vocabulary: wartime decision = wartime act; create a British royal name = changed the family name to Windsor; answer signal = ii

Question 16: Section A

Correct Answer: i

Accepted Answers: i

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: During the First World War, however, German names became politically awkward in Britain.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ i เพราะย่อหน้า A อธิบายว่าเดิมราชวงศ์อังกฤษใช้ชื่อ Saxe-Coburg and Gotha ซึ่งเป็นชื่อที่เชื่อมโยงกับเยอรมัน และในช่วง First World War ชื่อเยอรมันกลายเป็นปัญหาทางการเมืองในอังกฤษ ใจความหลักจึงไม่ใช่การเปลี่ยนชื่อโดยตรง แต่คือเหตุผลว่าทำไม German family name จึงกลายเป็น liability หลักฐานสำคัญคือ “German names became politically awkward in Britain” ซึ่งตรงกับ heading i มากที่สุด

Paraphrased Vocabulary: German family name = Saxe-Coburg and Gotha; became a liability = became politically awkward; answer signal = i

Question 17: Section D

Correct Answer: viii

Accepted Answers: viii

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: The greatest early crisis came in 1936, when Edward VIII chose to give up the throne in order to marry Wallis Simpson

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ viii เพราะย่อหน้า D กล่าวถึง crisis ปี 1936 เมื่อ Edward VIII สละราชบัลลังก์เพื่อแต่งงานกับ Wallis Simpson ประเด็นหลักคือ private choice ของกษัตริย์กลายเป็นปัญหา constitutional ในที่สาธารณะ ดังนั้น heading “A crisis caused by a king's private choice” ตรงกับใจความทั้งย่อหน้ามากที่สุด

Paraphrased Vocabulary: crisis = greatest early crisis; king's private choice = chose to give up the throne in order to marry; answer signal = viii

Question 18: Section E

Correct Answer: iv

Accepted Answers: iv

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: Under George VI and then Elizabeth II, the House of Windsor became closely linked with mass media.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ iv เพราะย่อหน้า E อธิบายความสัมพันธ์ระหว่าง House of Windsor กับ mass media เช่น radio broadcasts, televised coronation, documentaries และ interviews ใจความหลักคือราชวงศ์ถูก shaped by broadcast media และสื่อทำให้ monarchy visible มากขึ้น จึงเลือก heading iv ไม่ใช่ vii เพราะพิธี coronation เป็นเพียงตัวอย่างหนึ่งภายใต้ประเด็นใหญ่เรื่องสื่อ

Paraphrased Vocabulary: shaped by broadcast media = became closely linked with mass media; broadcast media = radio broadcasts / televised coronation; answer signal = iv

Question 19: Section F

Correct Answer: vi

Accepted Answers: vi

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: The Windsors also had to adapt to the decline of the British Empire.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ vi เพราะย่อหน้า F กล่าวถึงการเปลี่ยนจาก British Empire ไปสู่ Commonwealth และบทบาทของ monarch ที่เปลี่ยนจาก imperial ruler เป็น symbolic head of a voluntary association ประเด็นหลักคือผลของ imperial change ต่อ monarchy อย่างชัดเจน จึงตรงกับ heading vi มากที่สุด

Paraphrased Vocabulary: imperial change = decline of the British Empire / Commonwealth; effect on monarchy = role shifted from imperial ruler to symbolic head; answer signal = vi

Question 20: Section G

Correct Answer: v

Accepted Answers: v

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: In 1960, it was announced that most descendants who needed a surname would use Mountbatten-Windsor.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ v เพราะย่อหน้า G อธิบายประเด็น family identity หลัง Elizabeth II แต่งงานกับ Prince Philip และการประนีประนอมเรื่อง surname Mountbatten-Windsor ซึ่งเกี่ยวข้องกับ marriage, succession และชื่อครอบครัวใหม่โดยตรง heading v จึงสรุปย่อหน้านี้ได้ครบกว่า heading อื่น

Paraphrased Vocabulary: marriage = Elizabeth II married Prince Philip; new family surname = Mountbatten-Windsor; succession = descendants; answer signal = v

Question 21: Answer signal ....................
Correct Answer: Albert

Accepted Answers: Albert

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: a name inherited through Queen Victoria's husband, Prince Albert.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ Albert เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary ถามว่าชื่อเดิมของ royal family inherited through Prince ใคร และ passage ระบุว่า inherited through Queen Victoria's husband, Prince Albert คำตอบต้องเป็นคำเดียวจาก passage และเป็นชื่อเฉพาะที่เติมหลัง Prince ได้พอดี จึงตอบ Albert ไม่ควรตอบ Prince Albert เพราะคำสั่งคือ ONE WORD ONLY


Paraphrased Vocabulary: answer signal = a name inherited through queen victoria s husband prince albert; answer signal = Albert

Question 22: Selected Windsor, and connected with ....................
Correct Answer: residence

Accepted Answers: residence

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: The new name was taken from Windsor Castle, a famous royal residence.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ residence เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary บอกว่า George V selected Windsor เพราะ connected with a famous ____ ส่วน passage ระบุว่า Windsor Castle เป็น a famous royal residence คำว่า selected Windsor ใน summary เทียบกับ the new name was taken from Windsor Castle ได้ และคำที่ต้องเติมคือ residence ซึ่งเป็นคำเดียวจาก passage


Paraphrased Vocabulary: selected windsor and connected with = the new name was taken from windsor castle a famous; answer signal = residence

Question 23: Helped protect, and during wartime ....................
Correct Answer: crown

Accepted Answers: crown

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: It was a wartime act designed to protect the crown from suspicion

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ crown เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary ถามว่า new name helped protect the ____ from suspicion during wartime และ passage ระบุว่านี่เป็น wartime act designed to protect the crown from suspicion โครงสร้างของ summary ตรงกับ passage แทบทั้งหมด คำตอบจึงเป็น crown ซึ่งเป็นคำเดียวและเข้ากับ article “the” ได้ถูกต้อง


Paraphrased Vocabulary: helped protect and during wartime = it was a wartime act designed to protect the crown; answer signal = crown

Question 24: Wish to marry, and answer signal ....................
Correct Answer: problem

Accepted Answers: problem

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: a private choice by a monarch could become a public constitutional problem.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ problem เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary กล่าวว่าความต้องการแต่งงานของ Edward VIII created a constitutional ____ และ passage สรุปเหตุการณ์นี้ว่า a private choice by a monarch could become a public constitutional problem คำว่า wish to marry สรุปจาก Edward VIII chose to marry Wallis Simpson และคำตอบ problem เป็นคำเดียวจาก passage โดยตรง


Paraphrased Vocabulary: to marry and answer signal = a private choice by a monarch could become a public; answer signal = problem

Question 25: Under Elizabeth II, and became independent ....................
Correct Answer: colonies

Accepted Answers: colonies

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: By the middle of Elizabeth II's reign, many former colonies had become independent states

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ colonies เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary ถามว่า under Elizabeth II monarchy had to adjust as many former ____ became independent และ passage ระบุว่า many former colonies had become independent states คำตอบต้องเป็นคำเดียวจาก passage และเป็นคำนามพหูพจน์ที่เข้ากับ many former จึงตอบ colonies


Paraphrased Vocabulary: elizabeth ii and became independent = by the middle of elizabeth ii s reign many former; answer signal = colonies

Question 26: Some descendants, and answer signal ....................
Correct Answer: Mountbatten-Windsor

Accepted Answers: Mountbatten-Windsor

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 2 - The History of the House of Windsor

Exact Portion: most descendants who needed a surname would use Mountbatten-Windsor.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ Mountbatten-Windsor เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary ถามว่า descendants ใช้ surname อะไร และ passage ระบุว่า most descendants who needed a surname would use Mountbatten-Windsor คำนี้เป็นคำเดียวแบบ hyphenated compound ตามกติกา ONE WORD ONLY และเป็นคำตอบตรงจาก passage จึงไม่ควรแยกเป็นสองคำหรือเติมคำอื่น


Paraphrased Vocabulary: some descendants and answer signal = most descendants who needed a surname would use mountbatten windsor; answer signal = Mountbatten-Windsor
